## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Model and Evidence Impact

Describe any effect on model semantics, accounting, calibration, validation,
data provenance, reproducibility, or generated artifacts. Write `None` when a
category is not affected.

## Verification

List the commands and scenarios used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused and contains no unrelated changes.
- [ ] Relevant tests and documentation have been updated.
- [ ] Generated repository artifacts are current, or this change does not affect them.
- [ ] New data include provenance, transformation, units, and reuse terms.
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] If the CLA applies, I understand this pull request cannot be merged until the CLA status check passes.
